warnings: Club plugins (SplitText, DrawSVG, MorphSVG, ScrambleText, CustomBounce, CustomWiggle, Physics2D, InertiaPlugin) are not present in this environment; each section wraps those plugin calls with hasPlugin(...) checks and falls back to manual char/line splits, stroke-dash reveals, or power-eased yoyo tweens — no runtime errors either way.

Skills section uses 500vh + sticky pin; sub-panel ScrollTriggers fade panels and run activate(moduleId) to push the chosen 3D module's emissiveIntensity / scale up and dim the rest. Base Z per module group is cached on group.userData.baseZ so resets restore cleanly.

Experience section sets timelineRing.visible=true at section-enter and animates torus + 4 node material opacity 0→1 via ScrollTrigger scrub. Camera orbit uses a proxy {p:0..1} whose onUpdate writes cam.position.x/y/z from sin/cos of p*2π.
Contact section pulses the core with repeated yoyo tween using bounce.out if CustomBounce is registered, otherwise power2.inOut.
